# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
resources:
- type: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
  apiVersion: '2021-02-01'
  name: 'myFunctionApp'
  location: '[resourceGroup().location]'
  kind: 'functionapp'
  properties:
    serverFarmId: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'myAppServicePlan')]'
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: 'AzureWebJobsStorage'
        value: '[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', variables('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2021-02-01').keys[0].value)]'
  identity:
    type: 'SystemAssigned'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2021-04-01-preview'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'myFunctionApp', 'StorageAccountContributor')]'
  properties:
    principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'myFunctionApp'), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]'
    roleDefinitionId: '[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]'
    scope: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2021-04-01-preview'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'myFunctionApp', 'KeyVaultContributor')]'
  properties:
    principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'myFunctionApp'), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]'
    roleDefinitionId: '[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b86a8fe4-44ce-4948-aee5-eccb2c155cd7')]'
    scope: '[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2021-04-01-preview'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'myFunctionApp', 'SQLDBContributor')]'
  properties:
    principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'myFunctionApp'), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]'
    roleDefinitionId: '[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec')]'
    scope: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2021-04-01-preview'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'myFunctionApp', 'CosmosDBContributor')]'
  properties:
    principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'myFunctionApp'), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]'
    roleDefinitionId: '[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '5bd9cd88-fe45-4216-938b-f97437e15450')]'
    scope: '[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', variables('cosmosDbAccountName'))]'

variables:
  storageAccountName: 'mystorageaccount'
  keyVaultName: 'myKeyVault'
  sqlServerName: 'mySqlServer'
  sqlDatabaseName: 'mySqlDatabase'
  cosmosDbAccountName: 'myCosmosDbAccount'
